## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**gt-14 (excerpt):** - Ties overnight escalation (GCC energy, Tel Aviv strikes, Larijani assassination) to maximalist war aims and censorship of footage. - Introduces “law of proximity”: nearest (often domestic) games drive decisions more than abstract interstate conflict. - Surveys US elite vs counter-elite, Tel Aviv vs Jerusalem, and Iran theocracy vs secular nationalism as internal drivers. ---
